Meta.homeTitle: Nwaya — Turn Everyday Habits into Acts of Worship
Meta.homeDescription: Nwaya is a collection of righteous intentions for everyday activities—such as sleep, work, and exercise—supported by evidence from the Quran, the Sunnah, the sayings of the early generations, and the scholars of Islam.
Meta.categoryDescription: Righteous intentions for {{category}}, supported by evidence from the Quran, the Sunnah, the sayings of the early generations, and the scholars of Islam.

Home.tagline: Turn your everyday habits into acts of worship by renewing your intention for Allah in your sleep, work, and exercise, with authentic evidence from the Quran, the Sunnah, the early generations, and the scholars of Islam.
Home.featuredQuote: Worldly actions are judged according to the intention of the one who performs them. If he intends good through them, they become good for him; otherwise, he will have only what he intended. This is due to the saying of the Prophet ﷺ: “Actions are only by intentions, and every person shall have only what he intended.”
Home.featuredQuoteAttribution: — Shaykh Muhammad ibn Ṣāliḥ al-'Uthaymīn رحمه الله
Home.secondQuote: How many a small deed is made great by one's intention, and how many a great deed is made small by one's intention.
Home.secondQuoteAttribution: — Narrated from Abdullah ibn al-Mubarak رحمه الله
Home.sleepDescription: Intend to follow the Sunnah, give your body its rightful rest, and gain strength to worship Allah and fulfill your responsibilities.
Home.workDescription: Intend to earn lawful provision, support yourself and your family, benefit others, and remain independent from asking people.
Home.gymDescription: Intend to strengthen your body for the obedience of Allah, preserve your health, prepare yourself to protect your family, and maintain a dignified appearance without arrogance or extravagance.

Footer.rights: We ask Allah to grant us sincerity in our intentions and acceptance of our deeds.
Footer.builtFor: Helping Muslims seek reward in their everyday actions through sincere intention.
